cards.name: Local AI council
cards.source: public reporting about local self-hosted AI experiments
cards.capability: local-first multi-model council, private retrieval memory, local inference experimentation, parallel model comparison
cards.notes: Absorb the capability pattern only; do not copy identity, likeness, voice, private code, or copyrighted media.

cards.name: AI delivery control loop
cards.source: AI DevOps reporting and agent-harness research literature
cards.capability: AI-speed software delivery with quality gates, hidden-work tracking, branch/PR/CI orchestration, and verification loops
cards.notes: Map ideas into OAK gates, CI evidence, code review load tracking, and repository automation.

cards.name: Agent harness reference architecture
cards.capability: model wrapper layer that manages tools, state, resource bounds, execution traces, and repository actions
cards.notes: Use as a conceptual interface for TFUGA assistant operations.

oak_rule: capability -> source/license -> adapter boundary -> tests -> docs -> draft PR
safety_rule: absorb capabilities and interface patterns, not raw third-party code or identity assets
